sections.paragraph:
κνίζω

I. to scrape or grate: to tickle: metaph., of love, to nettle, chafe, irritate, Hdt., Eur.; of satiety, Pind.; of anxiety, Hdt., etc.; οὐ κνίσω τὸ ρῆμ' ἕκαστον will not attack every word, Ar.:—Pass., κνίζεσθαί τινος to be stung (with love) for one, Theocr.

II. κν. ὀργάν to provoke anger, Pind.
